builder_claims.claim: Script-first discovery now maps receipt producers and dangerous legacy fields
Migration priorities are explicit by P0/P1/P2/P3
Stage 0 closeout has actionable next pipeline and does not mass-migrate

attacks.detail: Inventory is replayable and machine-readable; checker classifies dangerous fields instead of blindly failing.
P0 remains 4 and unknown/manual-review remains 272; clean PASS must stay blocked.
No mass migration attempted; outputs are preflight-only and within task scope.
Scanner heuristics may still miss edge-case producers or over-classify some legacy conventions; independent review required.
